title: Choclatey:Directors cut
description: My version of my Community made Quality of life modpack.
body:
This is a branch of my Choclatey QOL modpack without the community influences. 

It's My personal modpack i use on vanilla servers. 

Its also a testing ground for mods that may end up on the main Choclatey release.

# Why?
Because the community version is extremely cluttered and has a few mods i personally just dont use and dont like.

# Whats in it?

still quite a bit of features

 - Map mod antique atlas fully clientside.
 - Better recipe book, Inventory solution
 - Better performance with sodium, sodium extra and iris.
